title: Track uses of TODO tags
description: Developers often use TODO tags to mark areas in the code where additional work or improvements are needed but are not implemented immediately. However, these TODO tags sometimes get overlooked or forgotten, leading to incomplete or unfinished code. This rule aims to identify and address unattended TODO tags to ensure a clean and maintainable codebase.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant: Description: Create new S3 bucket #TODO fix this later

Resources:
  MyBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    # TODO: Add encryption configuration
compliant: Description: Create new S3 bucket with encryption

Resources:
  MyBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
